days.buildTask: Move a sprite with the arrow keys
buildSteps: Open Scratch, click Create, name the project ‘Arrow Runner’
Add: when green flag clicked, go to x:0 y:0, point in direction 90
Add 4 scripts: when up/down/left/right key pressed, change x/y by 10
Test: can you move smoothly, without getting stuck?
logicSteps: Click Start and answer the questions one by one
If you get one wrong, read the hint and try again
Score 70% or more to pass (you can retry if needed)
typingSteps: Click Start and type the prompt exactly as shown
Aim for the WPM and accuracy targets
If you miss the target, hit Reset and try again
outcomes: Can explain what an event block does
